about.title: About Dakhla Aménagement
about.subtitle: A major player in the cement industry in Southern Morocco

history.title: Our History
history.p1: Dakhla Aménagement S.A. is a public limited company founded in 2015 by visionary Mauritanian investors, with the conviction that the Dakhla region needed modern cement infrastructure to support its rapid development.
history.p2: In 2018, our clinker grinding center in Lassargua began operations, marking the beginning of a new era for construction in Southern Morocco. With a capacity of 100,000 tonnes per year, we meet the growing demand for quality construction materials.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To produce, package and market premium construction materials, contributing to the economic and social development of the Dakhla-Oued Ed-Dahab region, while respecting the strictest environmental standards.

quality.name: Quality
quality.desc: Products conforming to international standards, tested in our in-house laboratory.

integrity.desc: Transparent governance and ethical business practices.

innovation.name: Innovation
innovation.desc: Continuous investment in our processes to improve performance and sustainability.

community.desc: Creating local jobs and supporting regional development.

process.title: Our Manufacturing Process
process.subtitle: From raw material to finished product, discover each step of our clinker grinding process

step1.title: Clinker Reception
step1.desc: Clinker is received and stored at our Lassargua facility. We ensure rigorous quality control at every delivery, verifying the chemical composition and physical properties of the raw material.

step2.title: Grinding & Dosing
step2.desc: Clinker is finely ground in our high-performance ball mills. Precise dosing of additives (gypsum, limestone, fly ash) guarantees the specific characteristics of each cement type.

step3.title: Quality Control
step3.desc: Each batch undergoes exhaustive testing in our laboratory: compressive strength, fineness, setting time, and heat of hydration. No product leaves the plant without a certificate of conformity.

step4.title: Packaging & Shipping
step4.desc: Cement is packaged in 50 kg bags or shipped in bulk. Our optimized logistics ensure fast and reliable delivery across Southern Morocco and beyond.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: A complete range of cements to meet all construction needs

cpj35.name: CPJ 35
cpj35.desc: Cement for common masonry, interior and exterior plastering, and bedding mortars. Ideal for residential projects and finishing works.

cpj45.name: CPJ 45
cpj45.desc: Versatile cement for reinforced concrete, floor slabs and common civil engineering works. The benchmark choice for most construction projects.

cpa42_5.name: CPA 42.5
cpa42_5.desc: High-performance cement for demanding structures, precasting and work in aggressive environments. High early strength allows rapid formwork removal.

cpj55.name: CPJ 55
cpj55.desc: High-strength cement for specialized works, deep foundations and civil engineering structures subject to high mechanical stress.

quality.title: Quality & Certifications
quality.subtitle: Excellence at the heart of every bag of cement

lab.title: Our Laboratory
lab.text: Our in-house laboratory, equipped with the most advanced technologies, performs chemical and physical analyses at every stage of the manufacturing process. From raw material reception to finished product shipment, no detail is left to chance.

footer.description: Clinker grinding center — Production, packaging and marketing of construction materials.

production.title: Production Center
production.text: Our clinker grinding center is located in Lassargua, near Dakhla. Inaugurated in 2018, it represents an investment of over 200 million MAD and has a production capacity of 100,000 tonnes per year. The site is strategically positioned to serve the entire Dakhla-Oued Ed-Dahab region and neighboring markets.

mills.name: Ball Mills
mills.desc: High-performance mills for fine and consistent clinker grinding, ensuring optimal fineness of the cement produced.

silos.name: Storage Silos
silos.desc: High-capacity storage facilities for raw clinker and various types of finished cement, ensuring permanent availability.

packaging.name: Packaging Lines
packaging.desc: Automated 50 kg bag packaging lines and bulk loading facilities for efficient logistics.

lab.name: Quality Laboratory
lab.desc: In-house laboratory equipped with advanced analysis instruments for quality control at every stage of production.

location.title: Location
location.access: Accessibility: National Route N1, 15 km from Dakhla city center

nm.name: NM 10.1.004
nm.desc: Moroccan standard defining specifications and test methods for Portland cements. Our compliance with this standard ensures that our cements meet national quality requirements.

en.name: EN 197-1
en.desc: European standard for the composition, specifications and conformity criteria of common cements. This certification attests to the compliance of our products with international standards.

iso.name: ISO 9001
iso.desc: Quality management system. Our certification process is progressing according to the planned schedule, with an audit planned for 2025. This certification will demonstrate our commitment to continuous improvement of our processes.

testing.title: Testing Process
testing.desc: Each production batch undergoes a rigorous testing process before being placed on the market. Our in-house laboratory performs comprehensive chemical and physical analyses, and samples are regularly sent to independent external laboratories for validation.

commitment.title: Our Quality Commitment
commitment.text: Quality is at the heart of our strategy. We are committed to maintaining the highest quality standards through rigorous controls, continuous training of our teams and constant investment in our laboratory equipment. Our goal is zero defects across our entire production chain.

environment.text: Dakhla Aménagement is committed to minimizing its environmental impact. We constantly optimize our energy consumption and reduce our carbon footprint.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions

q1.question: What types of cement do you produce?
q1.answer: We produce a complete range of cements: CPJ 35 for common masonry, CPJ 45 for reinforced concrete, CPA 42.5 for demanding structures and precasting, and CPJ 55 for high-strength specialized works.

q2.question: How can I place an order?
q2.answer: You can place an order by contacting our sales team by email at contact@dakhla-amenagement.ma or by phone. We will provide you with a personalized quote tailored to your needs.

q3.question: What are the delivery areas?
q3.answer: We deliver throughout the Dakhla-Oued Ed-Dahab region and surrounding areas. For deliveries to other regions, please contact us to discuss possibilities.

q4.question: How do you guarantee the quality of your products?
q4.answer: Each production batch is tested in our in-house laboratory. We perform comprehensive chemical and physical analyses at every stage of the process. Our products comply with NM 10.1.004 and EN 197-1 standards.

q5.question: Are your cements certified?
q5.answer: Yes, our cements comply with NM 10.1.004 (Moroccan standard) and EN 197-1 (European standard). We are also in the process of obtaining ISO 9001 certification.

q6.question: Is it possible to visit the plant?
q6.answer: Visits to our Lassargua production center are possible by appointment. Please contact our communications department to arrange a visit.

q7.question: How can I apply for a job?
q7.answer: You can send your CV and cover letter to recrutement@dakhla-amenagement.ma. Check our Careers page for open positions.

q8.question: How can I contact you?
q8.answer: You can reach us by email at contact@dakhla-amenagement.ma, by phone at +212 5XX-XXXXXX, or via the contact form on our website. Our headquarters is located at Corner of Lagouira St., El Walae Ave., Dakhla.

q9.question: What packaging options are available?
q9.answer: Our cements are available in 50 kg bags and in bulk. Bulk packaging is particularly suited for large-scale construction sites and concrete plants.

q10.question: What is the delivery time?
q10.answer: Delivery times vary depending on the destination and quantity ordered. Generally, we ensure delivery within 48 to 72 hours for the Dakhla-Oued Ed-Dahab region. Contact us for a precise timeframe.
